productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Casual Black Shoes
description: This rugged pair in a squared toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperLeather uppers for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleSquared toe box for more comfortLace-ups for a snug FitPadded collar and tongue for extra comfortLogo tab appliqued on the tongue abd attached on the sideTextile lining for greater comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceTextured horizontal ridges for better gripHeel for ergonomic comfortWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
